revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Br_separated_entries%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk|630,000+}} {{Template shortcut|br entries|br list}} {{stack|{{Lua|Module:Separated entries}}}} This template is used primarily in infoboxes to create a <br /> delimited collection of items, only adding the <br /> tags where needed. '''Note:''' For lists of items, without bullets, do not use this template, but use {{tl|unbulleted list}} or {{tl|plainlist}} instead, for better [[WP:ACCESS|accessibility]]. == Usage == :{{br separated entries|entry1|entry2|entry3|entry4|entry5|...}} == Example == {| class="wikitable" ! Code !! Result |- | {{br separated entries|entry1|entry2|entry3}} || {{br separated entries|entry1|entry2|entry3}} |- | {{br separated entries| |entry2|entry3}} || {{br separated entries| |entry2|entry3}} |- | {{br separated entries|entry1| |entry3}} || {{br separated entries|entry1| |entry3}} |- | {{br separated entries|entry1|entry2| }} || {{br separated entries|entry1|entry2| }} |- | {{br separated entries|entry1| | }} || {{br separated entries|entry1| | }} |- | {{br separated entries| |entry2| }} || {{br separated entries| |entry2| }} |- | {{br separated entries| | |entry3}} || {{br separated entries| | |entry3}} |- | {{br separated entries| | | }} || {{br separated entries| | | }} |- | {{br separated entries|entry1|entry2|entry3|entry4|entry5|entry6}} || {{br separated entries|entry1|entry2|entry3|entry4|entry5|entry6}} |} ===Template data=== {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "description": "Creates a
delimited collection of items. Primarily for use in infoboxes, it only adds the
tags where needed. ", "params": { "1": { "label": "First item", "description": "First item, may be null", "type": "string", "required": false }, "2": { "label": "Second item", "description": "Second item, many more items can be added", "type": "string", "required": false } }} == See also == * {{tl|comma separated entries}} * {{tl|space separated entries}} * {{tl|plainlist}} * {{tl|flatlist}} * {{tl|pagelist}} * {{tl|unbulleted list}} * [[Module:separated entries]], the [[Wikipedia:Lua|Lua]] module on which this template is based. {{Sandbox other| | }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:List formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
